ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone classification of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "avg_no2" REAL /* Average NO2 concentration (10^15 molec cm^-2) */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty level in the NO2 concentration measurement (%) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for NO2 concentration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "no2_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change measurement */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the change was measured */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year for the change calculation */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year for the change calculation */,
  "change_since_2005" REAL /* Change in NO2 concentration since 2005 (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_no2_changes_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the state belongs to */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
